task_completion.description: Apply Heading styles and insert an automated Table of Contents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An automated Table of Contents should be visible at the beginning of the document. Article titles should appear larger/styled as 'Heading 1' and Section titles as 'Heading 2'.

task_completion.description: Format Grievance Procedure steps as a Numbered List in Article 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Article 3, the steps for the Grievance Procedure should be formatted as a standard numbered list (e.g., 1., 2., 3.) with proper list indentation.

task_completion.description: Convert wage progression data into a 5-column table with a bold header in Article 7.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Article 7, there should be a visible table grid with exactly 5 columns. The text in the top row (header) of this table must be bolded.

task_completion.description: Apply redline formatting to specific text in Article 5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Article 5, the text 'twenty-four (24) hours' must have a strikethrough line through it, and the text 'forty-eight (48) hours' must be both bolded and underlined.

task_completion.description: Apply redline formatting to specific text in Article 11.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Article 11, the text '15%' must have a strikethrough line through it, and the text '18%' must be both bolded and underlined.

task_completion.description: Include a centered footer with specific text and page numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom of the pages should show a footer containing the text 'Tentative Agreement - Pending Ratification' centered, along with a page number.

task_completion.description: Save the final document as CBA_Tentative_Agreement.docx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WPS Writer window title bar should display 'CBA_Tentative_Agreement.docx', or a file manager/save dialog should show the file saved with this exact name in the ~/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the WPS Writer GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the WPS Writer interface (ribbon, menus, dialog boxes) rather than using terminal commands to modify the file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use Python scripts or command-line tools to bypass manual formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show the execution of python scripts (e.g., using python-docx) or tools like pandoc to generate the output document.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents and Table are genuine word processor elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The TOC should look like an automated field (often with dot leaders and aligned page numbers), and the table should have actual cell boundaries/gridlines, rather than being manually typed text separated by spaces or tabs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input document is located at /home/ga/Documents/CBA_Draft.docx and the output must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/CBA_Tentative_Agreement.docx. The footer must contain exactly 'Tentative Agreement - Pending Ratification'. Redlining requires strikethrough on '15%' and 'twenty-four (24) hours', and bold+underline on '18%' and 'forty-eight (48) hours'.
